text: Being here, surrounded by glass and color, I am struck by a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The R+D wall reminds me of the ongoing search for meaning and innovation—the tension between what is known and what can still be discovered. The bright lights and reflected images create a mood of openness and possibility, but I also detect a faint anxiety, as if the unfinished dreams of the world are lingering just beneath the surface. I feel quietly inspired, yet restless to contribute, to explore what lies just beyond this glass threshold.
